reuse_reason: The identity set, file identities, and selection rule exactly satisfy the POC preflight cohort requirement; no replacement or method-dependent selection was made.
selection: selection_rank <= 5 within each canonical finger position 1..10, crossed with SD300b/SD300c and plain/roll
path_policy: relative to the external fingerprint-datasets root; forward slashes; no absolute paths
cohort_hash_scope: canonical compact sorted-key JSON of entries only
